description: Returns the top buy and sell orders for a specific tradeable item.

itemCode.description: Item code to retrieve orders for, e.g. grain, oil, iron.

output.description: Top buy and sell orders for the specified item.

fields.buy: array — top buy orders, each with price, quantity, and userId
fields.sell: array — top sell orders, each with price, quantity, and userId

notes: Buy orders are sorted descending by price (best bid first). Sell orders are sorted ascending by price (lowest ask first). Order object fields: price (number), quantity (number), userId (string).
